Do not machine washThese white sneakers from fila are perfect for running, training and urban wear. The mesh uppers make these shoes highly comfortable and breathable while the blue and silver panels add style and stability. The cushioned lining gives you greater comfort for extended periods of time, while the lightweight blue and silver phylon sole coupled with multi-directional grooves ensures excellent grip and support.
